wikitext:
{{Relic Infobox|Scroll Boxes|2}}
{{R|Scroll Boxes||2}} is an {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Ancient|Ancient|2}} {{2|Relics|Relic}}. Upon pickup, you lose all Gold and choose 1 of 2 packs of 3 cards to add to your Deck.

Each pack contains 1 random {{QueryLink|Cards|rarity:Uncommon|Uncommon|2}} and 2 random {{QueryLink|Cards|rarity:Common|Commons|2}}. You must take one of the packs before proceeding.

There is a 1% chance when playing {{KW|Defect||2}} that one of the card packs is 3 copies of {{C|Claw||2}}.

== Obtaining Scroll Boxes ==
At the start of the run, can be offered by {{KW|Neow||2}}.

== Update History ==
*'''Early Access v0.98'''
**Added Scroll Boxes to the game.
